title: WSL Hermes status summary prompt
mission: Produce a concise status summary of where Ghoti stands: current origin/main, the latest merged milestones, what the overnight operator MVP can do, and the single next recommended action. Read the status bridge and the handoff note as the memory source; do not invent facts.
files_allowed: read-only: 14_context status bridge and handoff notes
expected_output: A short status-summary markdown the operator can paste into the WSL Hermes session.
safety_rules: Status-only: no /run and no live control.
Resume the same WSL Hermes session; do not start a new one.
No secrets, no external API, no auto-send.
